welcome.title: Welcome to the Website Builder!
welcome.description: We'll guide you through the main features of the website builder. Here you can design and customize your dealership's website easily and intuitively. Click 'Next' to begin!

topbar.title: Builder Top Bar
topbar.description:
From here you can:

🏠 Project title: 'Website Builder'
← Back button to return to the dashboard
💾 'Save' button to store your changes
⚙️ 'Actions' menu with advanced options

💡 Tip: Save frequently to avoid losing your changes.

deviceToggle.title: Responsive View
deviceToggle.description:
Switch between different devices to see how your website will look:

🖥️ Desktop - Desktop computer view
📱 Tablet - Tablet view
📱 Mobile - Smartphone view

💡 Tip: Make sure your site looks good on all devices before publishing.

canvas.title: Builder Canvas
canvas.description:
This is your main workspace:

🎨 Here you'll see your website in real-time
🔧 You can click on any component to edit it
➕ Drag components from the sidebar to add them
📦 Components are organized from top to bottom

💡 Tip: Use responsive view to verify everything looks good on mobile.

sidebar.title: Components Panel
sidebar.description:
The sidebar contains all available components:

🧩 Hero Section - Featured start section
🚗 Vehicle Carousel - Vehicle carousel
❓ FAQ - Frequently asked questions
📍 Map - How to get to your location
⭐ Testimonials - Customer reviews
✨ And many more customizable components

💡 Tip: Drag and drop components onto the canvas to add them to your page.

saveButton.title: Save Changes
saveButton.description:
Very important! This button saves all your changes:

💾 Saves your complete website design
☁️ Changes are stored in the database
✅ You'll see a confirmation message when saved

💡 Tip: Save before making important changes to have a restore point.

actionsMenu.title: Actions Menu
actionsMenu.description:
This menu contains important options:

📊 Page Status:
  • Active - Your website is publicly visible
  • Inactive - Your website is hidden

🎨 Page Theme:
  • Light - Navigation bar with light background
  • Dark - Navigation bar with dark background

🔄 Start from Scratch - Reset builder with default template
🗑️ Discard Changes - Return to last saved state

💡 Tip: Activate your website when it's ready for your customers to see.

finish.title: Ready to Create Your Website!
finish.description:
You now know the main tools of the Website Builder:

✅ How to navigate the canvas
✅ How to switch between devices
✅ How to save your changes
✅ How to activate/deactivate your website

🎨 Now you can start designing the perfect website for your dealership! Remember to save frequently and test on different devices.

💡 You can view this tour again at any time by clicking the Tour button.
